About.title: About Us
About.heading: In Here, We All Fit
About.p1: At NFW, we believe fitness is for every body. No matter your age, shape, or experience — you belong here.
About.p2: Our studio in Ymittos offers a welcoming space where inclusivity meets intensity. Whether you're stepping onto a Pilates reformer for the first time or pushing your limits with functional training, our expert coaches are with you every step.
About.p3: Join a community where everyone fits in.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Visit us or get in touch

pilatesReformer.intro: The Pilates Reformer isn't just another exercise machine — it's a complete body transformation system. Using spring resistance and a sliding carriage, every movement challenges your muscles in ways traditional workouts simply can't.
pilatesReformer.why1text: Reformer Pilates creates long, lean muscles through controlled eccentric movements. You build real strength without the bulk — the kind of toned physique that turns heads.
pilatesReformer.why2text: Every reformer exercise engages your deep stabilizer muscles. After a few weeks, you'll notice better posture, a flatter stomach, and a core that supports you in everything you do.
pilatesReformer.why3text: The reformer's spring system provides resistance without impact. Whether you're recovering from an injury or want to push hard without punishing your joints, this is your answer.
pilatesReformer.why4text: The sliding carriage allows deeper stretches than mat work alone. You'll gain mobility in your hips, spine, and shoulders that carries over to every part of your life.
pilatesReformer.nfw1text: Our studio features top-of-the-line reformers in a purpose-built space with mirrors, proper flooring, and a calm atmosphere designed for focused training.
pilatesReformer.nfw2text: Maximum attention, minimum waiting. Our classes are kept small so your instructor can correct your form and tailor the workout to your level.
pilatesReformer.nfw3text: Our certified Pilates instructors don't just count reps — they guide your body through each movement with precise cues that make every session count.
pilatesReformer.expect: Each 50-minute session follows a structured flow: warm-up on the carriage, progressive resistance work targeting specific muscle groups, and a cool-down with deep stretching. You'll leave feeling taller, stronger, and more centered.
pilatesReformer.whoFor: Perfect for beginners discovering Pilates, athletes seeking cross-training, anyone recovering from injury, and people who want visible results without high-impact stress. All fitness levels welcome — truly.

functional.heroSubtitle: Strength That Works in Real Life.
functional.intro: Forget isolated bicep curls on a machine. Functional training builds the kind of strength your body actually uses — lifting, pushing, pulling, twisting, and moving through space. It's training for life, not just for the mirror.
functional.why1text: Every exercise mirrors movements you use daily — carrying groceries, picking up your kids, climbing stairs. You won't just look strong, you'll feel it in everything you do.
functional.why2text: Functional circuits combine strength and cardio in one session. Your heart rate stays elevated, your muscles work hard, and your metabolism stays fired up hours after you leave.
functional.why3text: By training movement patterns instead of isolated muscles, you build balanced strength that protects your joints and spine. Move better today, hurt less tomorrow.
functional.why4text: TRX, kettlebells, battle ropes, medicine balls, bodyweight flows — every session is different. The variety keeps your body guessing and your mind engaged.
functional.nfw1text: Our functional area is stacked with premium equipment: TRX suspension systems, kettlebells in every weight, battle ropes, slam balls, resistance bands, and more.
functional.nfw2text: Our trainers are movement specialists. They watch your form, adjust your technique, and progress your workouts based on what YOUR body needs — not a one-size-fits-all template.
functional.nfw3text: Every exercise has a modification. Whether you're a complete beginner or a seasoned athlete, you'll train at your level and progress at your pace. No judgment, just results.
functional.expect: Sessions are 50 minutes of structured intensity: a dynamic warm-up, a main circuit of 5-6 compound exercises performed in rounds, and a focused cool-down. Expect to sweat, challenge yourself, and leave feeling accomplished.
functional.whoFor: Ideal for anyone who wants practical strength, fat loss, and athletic conditioning. From desk workers who need to move more to athletes who need to perform better — functional training adapts to you.

cardio.heroSubtitle: Push Your Limits. Find Your Rhythm.
cardio.intro: Cardio at NFW isn't mindless treadmill running. It's high-energy, coach-led sessions designed to build real endurance, torch calories, and leave you on a natural high. Music up, energy up, excuses out.
cardio.why1text: Structured cardio intervals train your heart and lungs to work more efficiently. In weeks, you'll notice you can do more with less effort — at the gym and in life.
cardio.why2text: Our cardio sessions are designed for EPOC — the afterburn effect. You'll continue burning calories for hours after your session ends, making every minute count double.
cardio.why3text: Nothing clears your head like 50 minutes of heart-pumping movement. The endorphin rush is real, the mental clarity is immediate, and the sleep that night is the best you'll get.
cardio.why4text: Regular cardio training strengthens your cardiovascular system, lowers blood pressure, and reduces risk of heart disease. It's not just fitness — it's preventive medicine.
cardio.nfw1text: Our cardio sessions are guided by instructors who set the pace, manage the music, and push you just enough. It's the difference between a solo jog and a concert — the energy is contagious.
cardio.nfw2text: We alternate between HIIT, steady-state, and circuit-based cardio across the week. Your body never adapts, your results never plateau.
cardio.nfw3text: Beginners work at 60%, advanced push to 100% — same session, different intensity. You're surrounded by people of all levels, all pushing their own limits.
cardio.expect: 50 minutes of guided cardio combining bodyweight movements, plyometrics, and conditioning drills. Each session has a clear structure: build-up, peak, and recovery. You control the intensity, we provide the framework.
cardio.whoFor: For anyone who wants better endurance, fat loss, stress relief, or simply a powerful energy boost. No experience needed — just the willingness to show up and move.
